cover.subtitle:
농민이 밀어올린 한 해,
위에서 내려온 개혁.
cover.imagePrompt: Late-Joseon-to-Japanese-occupation illustration, year 1894. ONE Korean peasant farmer (동학농민) — white commoner hanbok, straw shoes, head wrapped in a white cloth, holding a long bamboo spear with a small white flag tied near the top, determined three-quarter view. Behind him: a low stone wall with overgrown wild flowers and a distant silhouette of a thatched-roof village (Gobu reference). Sky: heavy gray clouds with a single shaft of pale amber light. Color: earth-brown + dark blue-gray + crimson flag accent. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 고부 봉기. 조병갑 학정에 전봉준 거병.
전주화약 체결. 집강소 통한 폐정 개혁.
우금치 전투 패배. 동학군 일본군에 진압.

items.name: 전봉준
items.desc: 고부 봉기 주도, 우금치 패배 후 처형.

items.title: 아관파천 길
items.desc: 을미사변 후 고종이 러 공사관 피신.

outro.tip_headline:
"고부 → 전주 → 우금치"
동학의 세 장면 순서.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 1차/2차 갑오개혁의 추진 기구(군국기무처/김홍집·박영효 연립내각) 차이, 동학과 갑오·을미의 시간순 정렬, 집강소·홍범 14조 위치 구분이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized small bamboo spear silhouette crossed with a brush. LEFT: a small folded scroll suggesting Hongbeom 14-jo. Cream #F2EDE3 base + crimson #B23A3A accent + amber #C77B3D highlight. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
